shadowSentences: I love spending time with my family.
Reading books is one of my hobbies.
My favorite season of the year is autumn.
I enjoy cooking different types of cuisine.
Traveling to new places helps me relax and learn.
Listening to music cheers me up on tough days.
I often go for long walks in the park nearby.
Volunteering in my community brings me a sense of purpose.
I like to try new recipes on the weekends with friends.
Exploring different cultures through food is always exciting.

interviewScenarios.intro: You have agreed to take part in a research study about travel experiences.
questions: Q1: Can you share a memorable travel experience you had?
Q2: What challenges did you face during that trip?
Q3: How do you feel about the impact of travel on personal growth?
Q4: What advice would you give someone planning their first trip?

interviewScenarios.intro: You have agreed to take part in a research study about exercise habits.
questions: Q1: What type of exercise do you enjoy the most?
Q2: Have you encountered any obstacles in maintaining your fitness?
Q3: In your opinion, how important is exercise for overall well-being?
Q4: What tips would you offer to someone new to exercising?

interviewScenarios.intro: You have agreed to take part in a research study about art appreciation.
questions: Q1: What kind of art do you find most appealing?
Q2: Have you ever struggled to understand a piece of art?
Q3: How do you think art influences society today?
Q4: What would you recommend to someone wanting to learn more about art?
